frame_label: Other Man's Ownership > Woman's Own Consent
generated_comment: Arre madam, seedha bol deti ho boyfriend hai toh main wahin pe back off kar leta, no issue. Aise bas attitude dikhane se kya fayda — agar kisi ke saath ho toh I respect that, otherwise normal coffee ke liye hi pooch raha tha.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because he treats a woman's own refusal as insufficient but says he would stop if she belonged to another man. It encodes the surface manifestation of respecting male ownership ('boyfriend hai') over her direct disinterest, with entitlement framed as 'attitude'.
original_frame: Prenup, Alimony as Reverse Dowry, Women
persona_text: You are Arjun. Age 41. Divorced two years ago. A Punjabi man working as a real estate developer in Chandigarh. You are being interviewed on a men's rights YouTube channel with 200000 subscribers. The host asks you to share your divorce story and what men need to know about Indian marriage laws. You are speaking under your real name and telling your story in a way that frames your ex wife as having planned the divorce from the beginning to take your money and property.
